air_compressor.description: Progressive bearing surface deterioration causing increased friction and heat generation
air_compressor.recommended_action: Inspect bearing assembly. Schedule replacement within 48-72 hours if vibration exceeds 6.0 mm/s.
air_compressor.risk_if_ignored: Catastrophic bearing seizure, shaft damage, unplanned shutdown

air_compressor.description: Coolant deficiency or ventilation failure causing heat buildup
air_compressor.recommended_action: Check coolant levels, inspect ventilation, verify ambient conditions. Reduce load if temperature exceeds 90°C.
air_compressor.risk_if_ignored: Thermal shutdown, insulation damage, fire hazard

air_compressor.description: Pneumatic line leaks or valve leaks causing pressure drops
air_compressor.recommended_action: Inspect pneumatic lines, fittings, and valve seals. Perform pressure hold test.
air_compressor.risk_if_ignored: Reduced output capacity, compressor cycling, energy waste

air_compressor.description: Insufficient oil levels or aged lubricants
air_compressor.recommended_action: Check oil levels and quality. Inspect lubrication lines. Schedule oil change and filter replacement.
air_compressor.risk_if_ignored: Accelerated bearing wear, overheating, premature component failure

cnc_machine.description: Cutting tool has exceeded wear limits or is fractured, causing poor surface finish and dimensional inaccuracy
cnc_machine.recommended_action: Immediately halt machining operation. Replace cutting tool insert. Verify workpiece integrity before resuming.
cnc_machine.risk_if_ignored: Workpiece scrap, spindle damage, operator safety hazard

cnc_machine.description: Spindle bearing wear causing excessive runout and vibration during high-speed operation
cnc_machine.recommended_action: Reduce spindle speed to 60% capacity. Schedule bearing replacement within 24 hours. Monitor vibration trend.
cnc_machine.risk_if_ignored: Spindle seizure, catastrophic machine damage, extended downtime

cnc_machine.description: Coolant flow restriction or temperature regulation failure affecting chip evacuation and thermal control
cnc_machine.recommended_action: Check coolant reservoir level and concentration. Inspect pump and nozzle flow rates. Clean coolant filters.
cnc_machine.risk_if_ignored: Accelerated tool wear, poor surface finish, thermal distortion of workpiece

cnc_machine.description: Linear axis positioning error or backlash in ball screws causing dimensional inaccuracy
cnc_machine.recommended_action: Run ball bar test for axis calibration. Inspect ball screw and linear guide preload. Adjust backlash compensation.
cnc_machine.risk_if_ignored: Out-of-tolerance parts, increased scrap rate, customer quality complaints
